3261510.name: The Carnival Killer
3261510.description:
Step right up to the most twisted carnival you’ll ever encounter! In The Carnival Killer, players find themselves trapped in a nightmarish amusement park where laughter turns to terror. The colorful lights and cheerful music mask a sinister secret: a killer clown stalks the grounds, hunting down anyone who dares to wander too close.

Key Features:

  • Stealth and Strategy: Use shadows and distractions to evade the clown while completing objectives.

  • Dynamic Environments: Each area of the carnival offers unique challenges and hidden secrets, from the Ferris wheel to the freak show.

  • Terror on the Loose: The clown isn’t just a mindless hunter—he adapts to players' strategies, making each encounter increasingly intense.

  • Multiplayer Mayhem: Team up with friends or go solo as you navigate the carnival, facing off against the clown in thrilling gameplay modes.

Solo Mode: Embrace the fear as a lone wanderer in the twisted carnival. Every shadow hides danger, and every sound could be the harbinger of doom. Rely on your instincts to navigate through the haunted carnival. Alone, you’ll feel the weight of your decisions, with only your wits to keep you safe from the clown’s relentless pursuit. Will you gather enough courage to confront your fears, or will you succumb to the terror lurking in the darkness?

Co-op Mode: Team up with friends for a heart-pounding experience! Work together to explore the carnival, strategizing and sharing resources to outsmart the cunning clown. Communication is key—coordinate your movements, distract the clown, and solve puzzles as a team. With each player’s unique skills, you’ll face a heightened sense of urgency and camaraderie. But beware: the clown evolves, adapting to your tactics and becoming more dangerous with every encounter. Can your friendship withstand the nightmare?

Whether you choose to brave the carnival solo or alongside allies, The Carnival Killer promises an unforgettable blend of suspense, strategy, and sheer terror. Choose your path and prepare for a heart-stopping adventure!

As you navigate through the darkened fairgrounds, you’ll encounter a unique layout filled with randomized challenges and surprises. The killer clown is always on the prowl, adapting to your movements and strategies as the carnival evolves around you. Each game session tests your adaptability and wits as you search for clues, solve puzzles, and discover hidden secrets.

  • Dynamic Level Design: Experience a fresh layout every time you play, with randomized environments that keep the tension high and the gameplay unpredictable.

  • Adaptive AI: The clown learns from your tactics, becoming smarter and more relentless, ensuring that each encounter feels uniquely terrifying.

  • Immersive Atmosphere: Engage in a haunting carnival filled with unsettling sights and sounds that change with each level, drawing you deeper into the nightmare.

The Carnival Killer features three different game modes to play from giving you and your friends different experiences to test your fear level. These game modes were designed for new ways to enjoy The Carnival Killer, will you be able to complete all three?

  • Normal Mode: Experience The Carnival Killer on the normal map facing up against tough killer clowns.

  • Pitch-black Mode: The Carnival has shut off all lights! The only light you have is your flashlight! 

  • The Clown Chase Mode: Trapped in a long run way, you and your friends must sprint to the end while being chased by a 50 foot clown! Beware the obstacles in the way and don't forget to collect the balloons along the way, if you forget one, there's no going back!
3261510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
